user.title: Emulated Hue
user.description: Set up the Hue bridge emulator. Alexa and other Hue clients will discover this as a Philips Hue bridge on your network.

data_description.listen_port: TCP port for the emulated Hue bridge API. Default is 8300. If using an NGINX proxy on port 80, keep this as-is.
data_description.advertise_port: Port advertised to Alexa via SSDP. Set to 80 if you use an NGINX reverse proxy in front of the bridge. Leave blank to use the listen port.

init.title: Emulated Hue Options
init.description: Select entities to expose as Hue lights and set their Alexa-visible names.

entity_names.title: Entity Names
entity_names.description: Set the name Alexa will use for each entity. Leave blank to use the entity's friendly name.
